query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pos_held_orders (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sessionId INT NOT NULL,
  label VARCHAR(128),
  customerName VARCHAR(128),
  customerPhone VARCHAR(32),
  items TEXT NOT NULL,
  discountAmount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT fk_held_session FOREIGN KEY (sessionId) REFERENCES pos_sessions(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pos_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `key` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  value TEXT,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

INSERT IGNORE INTO pos_settings (`key`, value) VALUES
  ('receipt_store_name', 'Dates & Wheat | تمر وقمح'),
  ('receipt_store_address', 'Fujairah, UAE'),
  ('receipt_store_phone', '+971 9 223 7070'),
  ('receipt_footer_message', 'Thank you for your purchase! شكراً لتسوقكم معنا'),
  ('receipt_show_logo', 'true'),
  ('receipt_show_vat_number', 'true'),
  ('receipt_vat_number', ''),
  ('default_vat_rate', '5'),
  ('enable_customer_display', 'false'),
  ('allow_price_override', 'false'),
  ('require_customer_on_sale', 'false'),
  ('auto_print_receipt', 'false');

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pos_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `key` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
